description: Triggered when the user wants to generate, iterate, or scale ad creative including headlines, descriptions, and primary text for any paid advertising platform.
should_trigger: Generate 15 RSA headlines for our Google Ads campaign
Write ad copy variations for our Meta Facebook ads
I have performance data from LinkedIn — help me iterate on my ad creative
Create bulk ad copy for our B2B SaaS product targeting CTOs
We need creative testing variations for our TikTok ad campaign
Write primary text and headline for a Meta ad with a 30-day free trial offer
Analyze these ad results and generate new variations based on what's working
should_not_trigger: Write copy for our landing page hero section
Design an A/B test for our homepage CTA button
How do I set up a Google Ads campaign budget?
What email subject lines work best for B2B outreach?
